emptyStateTitle: Select from gallery or generate new
dragToSidebarHint: Drag images to sidebar to generate
quickControlsNoModelHint: Select a model to start quick adjustments.
quickControlsXrHint: Quick controls are disabled during XR sessions.
revealEffectsOpenAria: Open reveal effects panel. Current effect: {{effect}}
revealEffectsMobileHint: Compact mobile entry. Pick an effect and return to the scene immediately.
helpSpeedMode: <kbd>Shift</kbd> Speed Up / <kbd>Alt</kbd> Precision - Control move & zoom speed
helpVRDesc: Tap VR button for immersive preview, move headset to look around
helpARDesc: View gaussian splat overlaid on your real environment (Quest 3/Android)
helpVRJoystickDesc: Left stick to move, right stick to rotate
helpVRResetDesc: Press A/X button on controller to reset position
zoomTooltip: Hold Shift + Scroll for Precision Zoom
gyroNotSupported: Your device does not support gyroscope
confirmDeleteFull: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please drop .ply, .splat, .spz or .rad files.
modelFormatHint: SPZ is 5-10x smaller with no visible quality loss. PLY preserves full original data.
formatToggleTooltip: Toggle model format (SPZ compact / PLY original)
convertAllToSpz: Convert All Existing Models to SPZ
lodHint: LOD dynamically selects optimal splats per frame based on device. Improves performance for large scenes but adds loading time.
lodPresetHint: Switches Spark LoD and foveation parameters instantly without reloading the model.
quickPresetHint: Recommended for most users: choose Performance, Balanced, or Detail. Use Manual only if you need advanced tuning.
defaultRevealEffectHint: Saved to this browser on this device only. Default is Magic; choose None on slower hardware to open models without startup effects.
advancedSettingsHint: These options are intended for advanced tuning and debugging.
advancedSettingsAutoHint: Advanced options are hidden in preset mode to keep the experience simple. Select Manual if you need fine control.
lodCompareHint: Toggle between LoD and non-LoD rendering source for quality comparison.
lodCompareUnavailableHint: Comparison mode is available when current scene includes both LoD and non-LoD data.
radModeHint: When enabled, viewer tries .rad first and falls back to SPZ/PLY/SPLAT if RAD is unavailable.
radPagedHint: Enable chunked streaming for large RAD scenes. Turn off to simplify debugging.
xrUpdateHint: Auto uses Spark XR lifecycle. Manual mode keeps frame-loop update as a compatibility fallback.
hfHint: Unleashes native device resolution and disables anti-aliasing to restore extreme sharpness, at the cost of high performance overhead.
settingsRestartWarning: Changing workspace folder requires server restart
